designBrief.silhouette: work vehicle with crane/manipulator arm and utility body
designBrief.palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips
designBrief.materialFamily: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture sheet for a red faction construction & repair vehicle in an alien RTS. Material: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor. Palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips. Alien design language: brutalist, asymmetric reinforcement, battle wear, non-human panel language. Include armor panel lines, subtle wear, faction markings as abstract glyphs. Forbidden: weapons, aggressive armor spikes. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless orthographic texture sheet for the hull of a rugged red sci-fi construction and repair vehicle. The primary material is heavily rolled gunmetal battle steel, featuring extensive scorched plating and prominent, large-gauge riveted armor sections. Vivid crimson and bright orange emissive accent strips glow subtly within recessed channels and along structural seams, indicating power flow or functional areas. Intricate alien glyphs are subtly etched into the steel, alongside strange, geometric vents and organic-mechanical conduits that appear otherworldly yet integrated, blending seamlessly with the rough metal surface. Ensure no perspective, no baked lighting, and absolutely no text whatsoever, maintaining a perfectly flat, tileable appearance.

A flat, orthographic texture map depicting the durable hull of a heavy-duty, red sci-fi repair vehicle. Constructed from thick, gunmetal rolled battle steel, the surface is heavily detailed with areas of intense scorching, indicating past repairs or energy discharges, and reinforced with large, precisely placed rivets forming distinct armored panels. Vibrant crimson and fiery orange emissive strips cut across the plating, highlighting crucial power conduits and access points with a soft, internal glow. Embedded into the metallic canvas are subtle, non-Euclidean patterns and unique, bio-industrial ports that hint at advanced alien manufacturing techniques, subtly integrated as part of the vehicle's unique industrial design. Maintain a perfectly flat projection without any perspective distortion, baked shadows, or overlaid text.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
